Class RequestProxyEngine

java.lang.Object
com.habbashx.proxy.engine.RequestProxyEngine
public class RequestProxyEngine extends Object
Byte Buddy interception target that drives the entire request pipeline for every proxy method call.

When Byte Buddy intercepts a call on the generated proxy subclass, it delegates to intercept(Method, Object[]). This method:

  1. Retrieves cached annotation metadata (MethodMeta) for the invoked method.
  2. Builds an initial MethodContext from the @Request annotation values.
  3. Runs all before interceptors via InterceptorHierarchy.applyBefore(MethodContext), allowing them to resolve path/query params and inject headers.
  4. Delegates to the Executor to perform the HTTP call and deserialize the response.
  5. Runs all after interceptors via InterceptorHierarchy.applyAfter(Object, MethodContext).

  • Constructor Details

    • RequestProxyEngine

      public RequestProxyEngine(InterceptorHierarchy hierarchy, Executor executor, MethodCache<MethodMeta> methodCache)
      Parameters:
      hierarchy - the ordered interceptor pipeline
      executor - the HTTP executor
      methodCache - the annotation metadata cache

  • Method Details

    • intercept

      @RuntimeType public Object intercept(@Origin @NotNull @NotNull Method method, @AllArguments Object[] args)
      Byte Buddy interception entry point — called for every method invocation on the proxy.

      @RuntimeType tells Byte Buddy to perform an unchecked cast on the return value so this single method can serve all return types. @Origin injects the reflected Method, and @AllArguments injects the runtime argument array.

      Parameters:
      method - the intercepted proxy method
      args - the runtime arguments passed by the caller; may be null for zero-arg methods
      Returns:
      the deserialized response, or a CompletableFuture wrapping it for async methods
